why_deepeval_not_cerai: CeRAI (AIEvaluationTool) requires ~3.5 GB of NVIDIA CUDA packages (torch, nvidia-cublas, nvidia-cudnn, triton, etc.) that are incompatible with Mac Apple Silicon (aarch64). The Docker build fails with OSError Errno 5 due to disk exhaustion before the image even starts. Beyond the Mac incompatibility, a tool requiring a 32-GB Ollama model (qwen3:32b) is misaligned with the infrastructure reality of DIGIT's target deployments in India, where commodity cloud (not GPU servers) is the norm. DeepEval uses OpenAI as the LLM judge, requires no GPU, and installs in seconds.
